text.title: Complex (12 Tasks) and Task-Split Examples, Quality Checklist
text.summary: Critical path chain for a 12-task complex feature, before/after task split for an oversized refactoring task, quality checklist for implementation plans, and rules for adapting examples.

example.note: Critical path as explicit chain — table format, not ASCII diagram
example.code:
## Critical Path
TASK-001 → TASK-003 → TASK-005 → TASK-008 → TASK-011 → TASK-012
Token estimates on critical path: TASK-001 (~40k) → TASK-003 (~50k) → TASK-005 (~40k) → TASK-008 (~30k) → TASK-011 (~40k) → TASK-012 (~20k)
## Wave Analysis (complex 5-wave example)
| Wave | Tasks | Parallel | Dependencies | |------|--------------------------------|----------|------------------| | 1 | TASK-001, TASK-002 | Yes | None | | 2 | TASK-003, TASK-004 | Yes | Wave 1 | | 3 | TASK-005, TASK-006, TASK-007 | Yes | Wave 2 | | 4 | TASK-008, TASK-009, TASK-010 | Yes | Wave 3 | | 5 | TASK-011, TASK-012 | No (seq) | Wave 4 |

rule.statement: Write wave analysis as a table (Wave, Tasks, Parallel, Dependencies) rather than as a diagram. Text tables are machine-parseable and comply with the no-ASCII-art rule.
rule.rationale: Agents reproduce ASCII box-and-arrow diagrams from examples. Table format produces the same information without prohibited formatting.

section.title: Task Split for Oversized Tasks
section.p: When a task estimate exceeds 100k tokens, split at natural code boundaries: interface → implementation → API layer. The refactoring example shows this pattern.

example.note: Before split — single task exceeds 100k budget
example.code:
### TASK-001: Refactor user service to use repository pattern **Context Estimate:** ~160k tokens
Files to modify: - src/services/UserService.ts (800 lines) - src/api/users/*.ts (12 endpoints) - tests/services/UserService.test.ts (300 lines) - tests/api/users/*.test.ts (10 files)
Problem: exceeds 100k context budget

example.note: After split into 3 tasks at natural boundaries
example.code:
### TASK-001: Create user repository interface (~50k tokens) Files: - CREATE src/repositories/UserRepository.ts - CREATE src/repositories/interfaces/IUserRepository.ts - CREATE tests/repositories/UserRepository.test.ts Depends on: None
### TASK-002: Migrate user service to repository (~55k tokens) Files: - MODIFY src/services/UserService.ts - CREATE tests/services/UserService.integration.test.ts Depends on: TASK-001
### TASK-003: Update user API endpoints (~60k tokens) Files: - MODIFY src/api/users/*.ts (12 files) - MODIFY tests/api/users/*.test.ts (10 files) Depends on: TASK-002

list.item: All AD-X from design have corresponding tasks
All file changes from design are assigned to tasks
Prerequisites fully documented (with version numbers for external deps)
Token estimates provided per task (no time estimates)
Critical path calculated as explicit task chain
Test tasks placed in waves AFTER the implementation they test
Each task traces to at least one AD-X
Each task traces to at least one FR-X

text.reference: Topological sort to detect cycles in task dependency graph
